results.rendered_html:
viyat n. The akysky, atmosphere, ether; paśyodagravatatvādbiyati bahutaraṃ stokamurvyāṃ prayāti  Ś. 1. 7 ;  R. 13. 40. 
Comp.
— gaṃgā
1 the heavenly Ganges.
2 the galaxy.
— cārin ( viyaccārin) m. a kite.
— bhūtiḥ f. darkness.
— maṇiḥ (viyanmaṇiḥ) the sun.
